module Acme.Inventory where

import qualified Data.Map.Strict as Map

stockOnHand :: Map.Map Sku Int -> Sku -> Int
stockOnHand m sku = Map.findWithDefault 0 sku m

module Acme.Inventory (stockOnHand) where

import qualified Data.Map.Strict as Map

stockOnHand :: Map.Map Sku Int -> Sku -> Int
stockOnHand m sku = Map.findWithDefault 0 sku m
